title: Cambridge C1 Advanced — Listening
instructions: This is a STUB content file. Real questions will be transcribed from cae/CAE Practice test listening.docx in Priority 1.

parts.title: Part 1 — Multiple choice (STUB)
parts.instructions: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

audio.note: You will hear each extract twice.

questions.prompt: 1 (stub) — What is the speaker's main point?

options.text: It is more complicated than expected.
It is more popular than expected.
